title: heredoc not workin
body:
### Issue Description

Was migrating my stack to podman but heredoc dosn't work (anymore?)

I've checked this issue dockerfile https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/24089 but this didn't compile (ubuntu wsl2). 

Dockerfile
```
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.3-lab
FROM docker.io/archlinux/archlinux:latest


RUN <<EXE
    echo 1
    echo 2
EXE

RUN echo finish
```

Podman version
```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.9.3
API Version:  4.9.3
Go Version:   go1.22.2
Built:        Thu Jan  1 01:00:00 1970
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```


### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. run command podman build -f Dockerfile.test .


### Describe the results you received

```
STEP 1/6: FROM docker.io/archlinux/archlinux:latest
STEP 2/6: RUN <<EXE
--> Using cache e496217eccccb6d2e1b6b4d17966330b9785a569033497b0a29f8b8d6edff798
--> e496217ecccc
STEP 3/6: echo 1
ERRO[0000] +(UNHANDLED LOGLEVEL) &imagebuilder.Step{Env:[]string{"PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin", "LANG=C.UTF-8"}, Command:"echo", Args:[]string{""}, Flags:[]string{}, Attrs:map[string]bool(nil), Message:"ECHO ", Original:"echo 1"} 
Error: building at STEP "ECHO ": Build error: Unknown instruction: "ECHO" &imagebuilder.Step{Env:[]string{"PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin", "LANG=C.UTF-8"}, Command:"echo", Args:[]string{""}, Flags:[]string{}, Attrs:map[string]bool(nil), Message:"ECHO ", Original:"echo 1"}
```

### Describe the results you expected

Build complete succesfully

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: We only support the latest upstream version, this seems to work fine for me.
